title: New in evangelion need info about bonus episodes
display_title: New in evangelion need info about bonus episodes
wikitext:
[]: New in evangelion, need info about bonus episodes             Quote Post by stalku » Sat Jan 15, 2011 11:40 am Hi, I just watched neon genesis evangelion (remastered), end of evalgelion, and death and rebirth. I heard that there were couple of episodes with different ending (you are not alone, you can not advance), but there are couple of versions of them like 1, 1.11 , what does it mean ? are they different ending episodes, or are they just remastered ones, help a noob in need.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Jan 15, 2011 12:14 pm -

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Jan 15, 2011 12:27 pm Evangelion 1.0 and Evangelion 2.0 are part of the Rebuild of Evangelion series. Basically remaking Eva but in HD, with a massive budget and fucking with the plot a whole bunch. Evangelion x.0 = the original release, shown in theatres. Evangelion x.11 = remastering the original release, usually with a few minor superficial changes. So Evangelion 1.0 and 2.0 are what we saw in cinemas and got initially released on DVD/ Blu-ray, and Evangelion 1.11 and 2.22 are edited versions of those with a few extra scenes and slightly changing existing scenes and got released a bit after straight to DVD/ Blu-ray.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Jan 15, 2011 1:05 pm OP - Its worth noting that there are theories out there that Rebuild is not just a remake but some sort of sequel to NGE through visual and dialogue clues - theories just as that Rebuild is the NGE universe that has rebooted post-Third Impact. These clues could mean something, or it could be Anno-sensei keeping his troll hand strong, no-one is sure yet - though theres plenty of people who think they are. Naturally theyve all been spotted and documented on here many many times over

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 15, 2011 1:33 pm Jayfive wrote: OP - Its worth noting that there are theories out there that Rebuild is not just a remake but some sort of sequel to NGE through visual and dialogue clues - theories just as that Rebuild is the NGE universe that has rebooted post-Third Impact. These clues could mean something, or it could be Anno-sensei keeping his troll hand strong, no-one is sure yet - though theres plenty of people who think they are. Naturally theyve all been spotted and documented on here many many times over
